orum_operator","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d5c4e7be80ba156a2703698120ff4e4","icon_width":64,"icon_height":23}","intro":"{"title_name":"运营官","title_detail":"《末世：开局青龙果实》的书圈运营官是一个珍贵的头衔，授予兼具创作力与责任心的书友，肩负活跃书圈的使命！","title_id":"is_book_forum_operator","big_icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0151264e36a6375ece6f9471ed95de86","detail_url":"dragon1967://webview?url=https%3A%2F%2Freading.snssdk.com%2Fwap%2Fbook-operator.html"}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"运营官","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"#5BA1E1"}","zh_title":"运营官"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7303515817755298878","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生+非囤货流+杀伐果断+动漫元素+双女主+有家人】
末世前重生，敖昕提前吃下海贼王中的动物系·鱼鱼果实·幻兽种·青龙形态。
丧尸来袭？
且看青龙腾空，血战千里！
手刃仇人，收服强者，组建属于自己的【百兽基地】！
第一神赐【恶魔果实】降临，全员可修习霸气，锻炼肉身。
敖昕：非幻兽种没资格入我核心层！
第二神赐【斩魄刀】降临，全员可修习灵压，锻炼灵魂。
敖昕：卍解！神魔灭！
第三神赐...第四神赐...
肉身强度达到极限的丧尸与大虚结合，诞生出了自称“神”的存在，
但在敖昕面前，
就连神，也要俯首称臣！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3bba41d390ac3197306fe3fce83bf3f6","author":"造物无情","author_id":"","book_id":"7303515817755298878","book_name":"末世：全民恶魔果实，我截获青龙","book_short_name":"末世青龙","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7303516065173094974","read_count":"30010","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1886119"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"925","tags":"科幻末世,重生,末世,求生,开局,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0c02d80749680eec7881a1ee9b78336a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312873&x-signature=cEM620ozS2C%2F6C9xVMZ0cMh1Tf4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111549469849","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"78"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322053433D2835B0EEB3906F9A01E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_durat
